description: Avaza is a work management platform for teams that combines project management, resource scheduling, time and expense tracking, invoicing, and related business operations. It is used by businesses to manage projects, staff work, client billing, and operational workflows.
summary: Avaza exposes a REST API at https://api.avaza.com/ authenticated by either OAuth 2.0 or personal access tokens, plus a first-party MCP server at https://mcp.avaza.com/mcp using OAuth.
